elements.title: a form of quartz
elements.contents: ... that a form of quartz (example pictured) resembles a bunch of grapes?

elements.title: Minako Yoshida
elements.contents: ... that Minako Yoshida was once called the "Queen of Funk"?

elements.title: 2026 Eurovision entry of Romania
elements.contents: ... that the 2026 Eurovision entry of Romania has been accused of "playing fast and loose with young women's lives"?

elements.title: Blue Peter's 42nd presenter
elements.contents: ... that Blue Peter's 42nd presenter once hosted a reading lesson for 6,715 children?

elements.title: Operación Estrella Polar III
elements.contents: ... that, as part of Operación Estrella Polar III, Chilean president Gabriel Boric became the first Latin American leader to visit the South Pole?

elements.title: C. Mortimer Wiske
elements.contents: ... that C. Mortimer Wiske composed one of the earliest operas to feature American life?

elements.title: Ashmore and Cartier Islands
elements.contents: ... that Australia allows some Indonesian fishers to operate near the Ashmore and Cartier Islands, but only if their boats have no motor or engine?

elements.title: Kyle Green
elements.contents: ... that Kyle Green has served more than 30 seasons as a basketball coach in the U.S.—and one in Denmark?

elements.title: a television series
elements.contents: ... that a television series about the forthcoming 2026 FIFA World Cup mentions neither FIFA nor the World Cup?
